Legendary Script
EFT Phone Sales
THE OPEN
Hey _Name_! It’s _Your Name_ with _Gym Name_. You signed up for our 6 week
transformation program on Facebook a couple days ago. How’s it going?
Prospect- “Good”
Great! I’m actually one of the transformation coaches here at the _Location Name_
location. I’m not going to take a bunch of your time, as I have a lot of applications to
get through today.
I do want to check in and see what was it that motivated you to sign up for this
program. Are you trying to gain muscle or burn belly fat?
Prospect- “Both”
I see.
DISCOVERY
What’s your age?
What’s your height?
What’s your weight?
What is your goal weight?
Do you want to increase size or muscle tone?
Where in your body would you like to see more definition?
Okay, so we’re looking to _Goal/Goals_. Is that correct?
This is a great physique goal… it’s absolutely worth fighting for. Just to make sure you
get the right attention, I want to get a feel for your training skill level. When was the
last time you trained consistently, 3-4 times per week, for more than 6 months
consecutively?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 4 --

Where do you carry most of your belly fat? The front, back, or the side?
Great. Now is it enough to pinch or is it enough to grab a handful?
This is great info. Now would you say it’s ___ to ___ inches that you are able to
grab/pinch in your hand?
Okay, so this is where most of your fat is and where you have been struggling the
most?
How long have you been struggling with this fat? (fat is still in their hand)
Why haven’t you taken care of it, since you want to?
TRANSITION INTO PITCH
Awesome _Name_. That makes you just like the people who best fit this program. So
this is what we’re going to do.
Right now, you’re _Current Weight_ and you want to get to _Goal Weight_. Since
we’ve helped over 1,000 people just like you accomplish their health goals, and given
the fact of where you’re at now, I can tell you that we can help you get to _Goal
Weight_ in six weeks. Would you be okay with that? Is it still a reasonable goal, like
you’re not going to be upset about that?
Prospect- “Heck no!”
Mind if I tell you how we’re going to make this happen for you?
PITCH
So here’s how we’re going to get you from _Current Weight_ to _Goal Weight_ and
burn the belly fat that’s located _Location from Discovery_.
We have a three-pillar approach to how we do body transformations.
It’s Fitness, Nutrition, & Accountability and unfortunately, most of the programs that
are out there will focus on just one thing… for instance… Jenny Craig.
Jenny Craig will give you a diet, but it doesn’t cover Fitness or Accountability.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 4 --

Or you sign up for a gym membership, they don’t give you anything, and the only
accountability they provide is when they call you for your credit card for your gym
payment. No diet, nothing.
See, someone is always missing something and that’s why we’re so successful is
because we have all three and when you have all three you can’t fail. Does that make
sense?
Prospect- “Yes”
PITCH
So here is what we need you to commit to.
Can you work out here 3-4 days per week, at our facility, with a coach? We coach you
through everything.
Prospect- “Yes”
Great! We got morning times and afternoon times. Which are you thinking?
Prospect- “Morning/Afternoon/Evening”
Great! We start as early as _Open Time_ and have one every hour until _Close Time_.
Can you fit yourself in there?
Prospect- “Yup”
Great! The second component is Nutrition. Our action nutrition plan is so easy. I’ve
had 12-year-olds do it and someone who doesn’t even speak English do it so I’m
confident you can do it. I promise you, it’s like a color coated plan, it’s so simple that
there’s no way you can’t follow it. So, are you willing to change your food habits?
Prospect- “Yup”
Great! Now the key with your training and nutrition is consistency, which brings me
to my third point. It’s the accountability. First off, you’re going to have your own
accountability coach that’s assigned to you specifically. That’s your point of contact.
That’s your fitness mentor. He’s going to be with you all six weeks. He’s going to
check in with you every week, so if you have questions, he’s there for you. Make
sense?
Prospect- “Yup”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 4 --

Second, you’re getting to get VOXER support. Now, 90% of the battle is not when
you’re at the gym, it’s when you’re at home. VOXER will give you access to us 24/7,
365, ask questions, we’ll get back to you as soon as possible. OK?
Prospect- “Yup”
Third, you’ll get access to a VIP private community so it’s not just a coach you’re
getting, it’s a family of like-minded individuals who are on the same journey as you
and are lifting you up along the way, so you hit your goal in record time. You’ll
connect people who are starting and people you have hit their goal already. Does
that make sense?
Prospect- “Yup”
So that’s how the program works. It’s a step-by-step, done-for-you system that will
get you from _Current Weight_ to _Goal Weight_, get rid of the _Inches of fat from
Discovery_ inches of belly fat that is located _Location from Discovery_, and do it all
as fast as possible. Make sense?
Prospect- “Yup”
Now, my main question for you is… are you IN?
The whole program costs $299, and you can do it in three payments of $97, all we
ask for on the phone just to hold a spot to make sure that you’re serious, is a $97
down payment. This way we can print out your meal plans and all the material you
need to get started. You arrive at the gym excited, ready to rock and roll and it’s all
laid out for you. The only thing you need to do is show up and follow our direction.
OK? Did you want to do your down payment of $97 on a Visa or Mastercard?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 4 --
